tool.name: NeMo Guardrails
tool.description: Open source guardrails framework for LLM and agent safety with a dedicated Colang DSL.
tool.pricing: Free OSS plus NVIDIA NIM options.
tool.statusNote: Repository moved from NVIDIA/NeMo-Guardrails to NVIDIA-NeMo/Guardrails.
tool.logoNotes: NVIDIA does not expose a standalone public NeMo Guardrails logo on the official docs surface; this uses the owner-controlled NVIDIA logo asset referenced by the docs theme (`_static/nvidia-logo-horiz-rgb-blk-for-screen.svg`) as the shared vendor mark.
tool.practitionerNote: Good fit when teams want code-defined conversational and retrieval guardrails they can run themselves, accepting more engineering ownership than a managed service.

deployment.detail: Open-source Python library deployed by the operator; NVIDIA NIM cloud separate.

auditLogging.detail: No built-in audit logging; operators add their own.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; certification applies to the operator.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; certification applies to the operator's ISMS.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; applies to the operator.

euAiAct.detail: OSS library component; deployers carry obligations for systems they build.
